items.text: The GCAS_singleton component shall declare a height variable and invoke the kinematicLinearization function from the gcas_nodes library to compute its value.
items.fragment: The GCAS_singleton component shall declare a height variable and invoke the kinematicLinearization function from the gcas_nodes library to compute its value.
items.requirement_fragment: The GCAS_singleton component shall declare a height variable and invoke the kinematicLinearization function from the gcas_nodes library to compute its value.

items.text: The component shall set the recovery time to 8.7 and the failure time to 16.0.
items.fragment: The component shall set the recovery time to 8.7 and the failure time to 16.0.
items.requirement_fragment: The component shall set the recovery time to 8.7 and the failure time to 16.0.

items.text: Once the simulation time exceeds the recovery time of 8.7, the height value must always remain greater than the minimum allowed height of 200.0.
items.fragment: Once the simulation time exceeds the recovery time of 8.7, the height value must always remain greater than the minimum allowed height of 200.0.
items.requirement_fragment: Once the simulation time exceeds the recovery time of 8.7, the height value must always remain greater than the minimum allowed height of 200.0.

items.text: Once the simulation time exceeds the recovery time of 8.7, the current height must be strictly greater than the height value from the previous time step.
items.fragment: Once the simulation time exceeds the recovery time of 8.7, the current height must be strictly greater than the height value from the previous time step.
